architecture.uml:
left to right direction actor User node "Alarm Buttons" node "Real-Time Clock" node "Alarm Controller"
User -- "Alarm Buttons" --
"Real-Time Clock" -- "Alarm Controller" --
architecture.description: Physical timing path showing alarm entry and time comparison hardware.

interface.description: The user presses physical buttons to set or enable the alarm.
interface.mechanical: The alarm buttons SHALL be accessible from the front panel.
interface.electrical: The button contacts SHALL convey alarm-setting input into the control electronics.

interface.description: A wire carries timing data from the real-time clock to the alarm controller.
interface.electrical: The timing wire SHALL carry current time data from the clock circuit to the alarm controller.
